title: Ahí viene Martín Corona
writer: Álvaro Gálvez y Fuentes, Paulino Masip
actors: Pedro Infante, Sara Montiel, Eulalio González
plot: Martin Corona (Infante) and Eulalio Gonzalez "Piporro" are local heroes that help the poor, the unfortunate and women in need. But Carmen Linares and Rosario Medina - double character - performed in by Sara Montiel won't fall for ...
